name: Onboarding Essentials
description: Welcome to Costa Coffee - values, culture, store layout
follow_on_prompt: Walk me through the Onboarding Essentials module step by step, covering Costa Coffee values, store layout and what a new team member needs to know on day one.

name: Coffee Mastery Level 1
description: Espresso fundamentals, milk steaming, drink recipes
follow_on_prompt: Guide me through Coffee Mastery Level 1 - start with espresso fundamentals: grind, dose, extraction time, and then move to milk steaming technique.

name: Coffee Mastery Level 2
description: Advanced latte art, cupping, seasonal menus
follow_on_prompt: Take me through Coffee Mastery Level 2 - advanced latte art techniques, cupping sessions, and how to present the seasonal menu to customers.

name: Food Safety Level 2
description: Food hygiene, temperature control, HACCP basics
follow_on_prompt: Run me through Food Safety Level 2 - cover the key hygiene rules, temperature control requirements, and the HACCP principles we follow at Costa.

name: Allergen Awareness
follow_on_prompt: Teach me about Allergen Awareness at Costa - list the 14 major allergens, explain our cross-contamination procedures, and how I should communicate allergen information to customers.

name: Customer Service Excellence
follow_on_prompt: Walk me through the Customer Service Excellence training - explain the HEART model in detail, how to handle complaints gracefully, and effective upselling techniques for Costa products.

name: Till Operations
description: POS system, cash handling, refunds, Costa Club
follow_on_prompt: Take me through Till Operations training - cover how to use the Costa POS system, handle cash accurately, process refunds correctly, and sign up customers to Costa Club.

name: Opening Procedures
description: Pre-opening checklist, equipment startup, team briefing
follow_on_prompt: Guide me through Opening Procedures as Shift Manager - run through the pre-opening checklist, equipment startup sequence, and how to deliver an effective team briefing.

name: Closing Procedures
description: EOD cleaning, cash reconciliation, closing checklist
follow_on_prompt: Walk me through Closing Procedures - cover end-of-day cleaning routines, how to reconcile the till, complete the closing checklist, and hand over to the next shift.

name: Barista Maestro Certification
description: Full Barista Maestro programme - 8 hour assessment
follow_on_prompt: Tell me about the Barista Maestro Certification - what does the full 8-hour programme cover, what are the assessment criteria, and how do I prepare to achieve this certification?

name: Fire Safety
description: Fire risk, evacuation procedures, extinguisher use
follow_on_prompt: Take me through Fire Safety training - explain the fire risks in a Costa store, our evacuation procedures, how to use different types of fire extinguishers, and the role of fire marshals.

name: First Aid Awareness
description: Basic first aid, emergency procedures, AED use
follow_on_prompt: Walk me through First Aid Awareness - cover basic first aid procedures for common incidents in a coffee shop, when and how to use the AED defibrillator, and how to call for emergency services.
